# Recorded-shape Twitch PRIVMSG lines for normalization golden tests. One raw IRC line per
# line; blank lines and lines starting with '#' are ignored. Covers plain text, single and
# multi emotes, multi-range emotes, unicode (rune-indexed emotes), emote-only, /me actions,
# replies, badges/colors, bits, mentions, and links.
